channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10722] Interop 2.10.3<->2.11 sanity-quota test_55: chgrp should failed with -EDQUOT
item.description:
sanity-quota test_55 - chgrp should failed with -EDQUOT
^^^^^^^^^^^^^ DO NOT REMOVE LINE ABOVE ^^^^^^^^^^^^^

This issue was created by maloo for sarah_lw <wei3.liu@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/4f7b9d14-12aa-11e8-a6ad-52540065bddc

test_55 failed with the following error:

chgrp should failed with -EDQUOT

client: lustre-master 2.10.58
server: 2.10.3

test log

running as uid/gid/euid/egid 60000/60000/60000/60000, groups:
 [dd] [if=/dev/zero] [of=/mnt/lustre/d55.sanity-quota/f55.sanity-quota] [bs=1024] [count=100000]
100000+0 records in
100000+0 records out
102400000 bytes (102 MB) copied, 7.41044 s, 13.8 MB/s
CMD: onyx-40vm9 lctl set_param -n os[cd]*.*MDT*.force_sync=1
CMD: onyx-40vm8 lctl set_param -n osd*.*OS*.force_sync=1
Disk quotas for grp quota_2usr (gid 60001):
     Filesystem  kbytes   quota   limit   grace   files   quota   limit   grace
    /mnt/lustre       0       0   51200       -       0       0       0       -
lustre-MDT0000_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       0       -       0       -
lustre-OST0000_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0001_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0002_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0003_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0004_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0005_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0006_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
Total allocated inode limit: 0, total allocated block limit: 0
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 60000/60001/60000/60001, groups:
 [chgrp] [quota_2usr] [/mnt/lustre/d55.sanity-quota/f55.sanity-quota]
 sanity-quota test_55: @@@@@@ FAIL: chgrp should failed with -EDQUOT
item.summary: Interop 2.10.3<->2.11 sanity-quota test_55: chgrp should failed with -EDQUOT

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/31531/
Subject: LU-10722 test: Add version check to sanity-quota test_55
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 6da01172941e6816614249fcc6d258cc68546bb0

Wei Liu (wei3.liu@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/31531
Subject: LU-10722 test: Add version check to sanity-quota test_55
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 52b264ded3028dd9c9286bc3bf91117f82633a6b

Sarah - Would you please submit a patch to skip this test for servers less than 2.10.58?

Thank you

sanity-quota test 55 was added by patch https://review.whamcloud.com/30146 for LU-5152 landed to master right before tag 2.10.58. So, we should add a version check to this test so that it does not run for servers less than 2.10.58.
